title: Privacy Policy
content:
## NOOWE Privacy Policy

**Last updated: March 25, 2026**

NOOWE ("we", "our", or "Platform") values the privacy of our users. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our restaurant management platform and mobile applications.

### 1. Information We Collect

**1.1 Registration Data**
When you create your account, we collect:
- Full name
- Email address
- Phone number
- Profile photo (optional)

**1.2 Location Data**
With your permission, we collect location data to:
- Find nearby restaurants
- Estimate delivery times
- Verify check-in at establishments

**1.3 Transaction Data**
When you place orders or make payments:
- Order history
- Payment methods used (we do not store complete card data)
- Transaction amounts and tips

**1.4 Usage Data**
We automatically collect:
- Device type and operating system
- IP address
- Pages visited and features used
- Date and time of access

### 2. How We Use Your Data

Your data is used to:
- Process orders and payments
- Personalize your app experience
- Send notifications about order status
- Manage loyalty programs and promotions
- Improve our services and features
- Prevent fraud and ensure security
- Comply with legal obligations

### 3. Data Sharing

We share your data only with:
- **Partner restaurants**: for order processing
- **Payment processors**: for financial transactions
- **Service providers**: hosting, data analytics, notifications
- **Legal authorities**: when required by law

We never sell your personal data to third parties.

### 4. Storage and Security

- Data stored on secure servers with encryption
- Transmission via HTTPS/TLS
- Biometric and two-factor authentication available
- Restricted access by authorized personnel only
- Regular backups and disaster recovery plan

### 5. Your Rights

Depending on your jurisdiction, you have the right to:
- Access your personal data
- Correct incomplete or outdated data
- Request deletion of your data
- Revoke consent at any time
- Request data portability
- Obtain information about data sharing

### 6. Cookies and Similar Technologies

We use cookies and similar technologies to:
- Keep your session active
- Remember your preferences
- Analyze platform usage
- Personalize content

### 7. Data Retention

- Account data: maintained while account is active
- Transaction data: retained for 5 years (tax obligation)
- Usage data: retained for 2 years
- After account deletion: data anonymized within 30 days

### 8. Minors

Our services are not directed at individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

### 9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification.

### 10. Contact

For privacy and data protection inquiries:
- **General Support**: help@noowebr.com
- **Privacy / DPO (Data Protection Officer)**: dpo@noowebr.com
- **Security Incidents**: security@noowebr.com
- **Accessibility**: accessibility@noowebr.com
- **Legal Affairs**: legal@noowebr.com
- Address: Av. Paulista, 1000 - Sao Paulo, SP - Brazil
